settings.title: Get $1,250 Off Invisalign – Limited Time Offer!

settings.editor:
New Invisalign patients can enjoy $1,250 off their treatment and receive a free BOOST in-office whitening! 

Book your consultation today – select ‘Invisalign Special’ when scheduling online.

Schedule your FREE Invisalign® consultation and if you’re a candidate for Invisalign clear aligners one of our Invisalign certified Dentists will develop a treatment plan to correct your smile. You will receive new, custom-molded clear aligners every few weeks to subtly enhance your smile without the burden of traditional braces.

The average case takes 6-12 months however we will cover all refinements needed after your first 12 months. Your happiness is our guarantee so we'll keep working until it's perfect. We also include free Boost whitening with all Invisalign cases to brighten your new perfect smile.

settings.title: Let us design your dream smile

settings.editor: Invisalign is a revolutionary teeth alignment solution that’s more discreet than traditional braces. You’ll receive the best possible care on your journey to a beautifully aligned smile.

Say goodbye to uncomfortable and obstructive metal wires and brackets. With Invisalign, you get a virtually invisible treatment so you can maintain a natural-looking smile while achieving that perfect alignment you’ve been waiting for.
Your smile is unique, and so is your Invisalign journey. Our expert team creates a fully customized treatment plan designed to help you get a smile you can be proud of.

Whether it's overcrowding, gaps, or bite problems, Invisalign addresses a range of dental issues in addition to straightening your teeth. Our team is dedicated to helping you achieve your dream smile.
With Invisalign, you don't just correct dental issues; you gain a renewed sense of confidence. You’ll still be able to smile freely throughout the entire treatment without the worry of metal braces.
After your treatment is finished you may opt to receive retainers for life at a cost. This ensures that your investment in your smile lasts for years to come!

Getting your ideal smile shouldn't be stressful. We offer a variety of flexible payment options, from Insurance to financing with Affirm, to make Invisalign treatment accessible and affordable for everyone.
Over 900 5-star reviews and counting...

settings.title: You've got questions, we've got answers

settings.editor: Don’t see the answer you’re looking for?

ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: Invisalign offers numerous advantages, such as a virtually invisible appearance, removability, and easier maintenance compared to traditional braces. It can address various orthodontic issues, providing a more comfortable and convenient teeth-straightening experience. Many patients find Invisalign to be worth the investment due to the numerous benefits it offers.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: Do you have to wear Invisalign 24/7?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: To achieve the best results, it is recommended to wear your Invisalign aligners for a minimum of 20-22 hours per day. The aligners should only be removed for eating, drinking, brushing, and flossing. Consistent wear of your aligners will ensure the effectiveness of the treatment.

Invisalign treatment involves a series of custom aligner trays that gradually shift your teeth into the desired position. These aligners are made using advanced technology and are designed to be switched out approximately every week. Each new set of aligners will continue the movement of your teeth until the desired alignment is achieved. For a detailed step-by-step breakdown of the Invisalign process please refer to our blog!

Invisalign treatment is generally more comfortable compared to traditional braces. Some patients may experience temporary discomfort or pressure when transitioning to a new set of aligners, but it typically subsides within a few days. Invisalign aligners are designed to fit snugly and minimize irritation.

Keeping your Invisalign aligners clean is important for maintaining good oral hygiene. Rinse your aligners with lukewarm water before wearing them or after removing them. It's recommended to brush your aligners gently with a soft toothbrush and mild toothpaste to remove any buildup. Avoid using hot water, as it can warp the aligners. Additionally, Swish Dental can provide specific instructions on how to clean your aligners effectively.

The cost of Invisalign in can vary based on individual cases and dental providers. Here at Swish, the standard Invisalign cost is $6,450. However, we occasionally run promotions on our Invisalign treatments and offer several financing plans. Additionally, insurance coverage may help offset the cost of Invisalign treatment. It's recommended to schedule a consultation to receive an accurate cost estimate tailored to your specific needs.
